name: Eggs Baked in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow casserole dish, combine half the breadcrumbs, 1 1/2 cups of sour cream, and half the butter.
2. Carefully place the raw eggs into the mixture.
3. Cover with the remaining ingredients and sprinkle with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Bake for about 20 minutes or until the eggs are set at a temperature of 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mrs. James Olfson
